member.name: T:ResumeChat.RagApi.Controllers.ChatController
member.summary: Chat controller for Resume RAG chatbot interactions

member.name: M:ResumeChat.RagApi.Controllers.ChatController.SendMessage(ResumeChat.RagApi.Models.ChatRequest)
member.summary: Send a message to the RAG chatbot
member.param: The chat request containing the user message and session ID
member.returns: AI-generated response based on resume context
member.response: If an error occurs processing the message

member.name: M:ResumeChat.RagApi.Controllers.ChatController.CreateSession
member.response: If an error occurs creating the session

member.name: M:ResumeChat.RagApi.Controllers.ChatController.GetHistory(System.String)
member.summary: Get chat history for a session
member.param: The session ID to retrieve history for
member.returns: List of chat messages in the session
member.response: If an error occurs retrieving the history
